creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
Created attachment 172975
Poudriere log of devel/newtonsoft-json build

monodis makes Segmentation fault with mono 4.4.1.0. The error appear when building devel/newtonsoft-json (see attached log).

Entering the jail and invoking monodis:
root@103amd-bsd-sharp:/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/newtonsoft-json/work/Newtonsoft.Json-8.0.3/Src/Newtonsoft.Json/bin/Release/Net45 # monodis Newtonsoft.Json.dll --output=Newtonsoft.Json.il
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
